description: Final Ralph product-readiness gate before VPS rollout. Scope is local verification plus deployable VPS configuration artifacts; it does not claim VPS success until run on the server.

userStories.title: Local full gate remains green
acceptanceCriteria: Worker and cron run-once artifacts remain all passing
MCP/API accuracy checks remain all passing
